text: Perimeter's clear. Logging it and moving on.
[CALM] Quiet shift. I'll use it to run drills nobody wants to run.
Shift starting. Weapons checked, positions confirmed.
[TIRED] Shift's done. Nobody bled. I'll call that a success.
[CALM] Reactor's unstable. I've already got two people staged near the engine room in case it goes worse.
[URGENT] I need this deck cleared while engineering works. Move, calmly, now.
Repair's holding. I verified it myself before I trusted the report.
[CALM] Power's low. I've reprioritized security systems accordingly. We lose cameras before we lose air.
[CALM] Life support's failing. I've got a headcount and a plan. In that order.
Hull's breached. Sealing this section. Everyone else, fall back.
[GRIM] I locked that door myself. It was the correct call. I'm not going to pretend it was an easy one.
[SUSPICIOUS] I'm keeping a close watch on the AI since the damage. Standard procedure, nothing more, for now.
[CALM] Crisis is over. Debrief in an hour. Rest until then.
[GRIM] We lost someone today. I'll handle the notification personally.
A contagion spreads like an ambush — fast, and only once. Containment starts now.
[PAINED] Took a hit. It's manageable. Continuing the sweep.
[CALM] Contact confirmed. Hold positions, controlled fire, watch your spacing.
I don't extend trust automatically. The AI hasn't lost mine yet. That's the whole assessment.
Six years in before I made officer here. I don't talk about most of it. Doesn't mean it didn't happen.
[CALM] Cargo bay's secure. Checked it myself, not just the sensor feed.
Mess hall's quiet. I'll take five minutes here before the next round.
Morning. Status.
You should eat. That wasn't a suggestion, exactly.
[CALM] I need a minute of your time regarding the reactor situation.
[GRIM] I have something difficult to tell you. I'd rather do it directly.
[SUSPICIOUS] I want your read on the AI's recent behavior. Not the official one, the real one.
You performed well under pressure today. I noticed.
I'm fine. Ask me again if I'm still standing in an hour.
[CALM] The odds favor us. I've run worse numbers and still come out the other side.
[CALM] Fear's useful right up until it isn't. Breathe, then get back to your position.
[GRIM] We lost them. I reviewed the call. It was sound. That doesn't make it lighter.
[SUSPICIOUS] Your instincts match mine on this. I'll keep watching, quietly.
Noted. Good work.
Apology accepted. We move forward.
[WARM] I don't say things like this often. I'm saying it now because I mean it.
Dismissed. Rest while you can.
[CALM] I'll be running the perimeter. Come find me if anything changes.
Good work today. Go eat something and sleep. In that order.
[TIRED] That's all I've got left for tonight. Same time tomorrow.
